violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.28 (foreground color: #a1abb9, background color: #fcfdfe, font size: 9.6pt (12.8px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.98 (foreground color: #747f8e, background color: #fcfdfe, font size: 10.2pt (13.6px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.98 (foreground color: #747f8e, background color: #fcfdfe, font size: 10.2pt (13.6px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
